'''鈭歝h-f-j''' ('''chafaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yot|yot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yot|yot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-f-j
|-
! Lemma
| chafaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chafajithi|chafajithi]] || [[word:chafajiji|chafajiji]] || [[word:chafajishi|chafajishi]] || [[word:chafaji|chafaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chafajuthuth|chafajuthuth]] || [[word:chafajujuj|chafajujuj]] || [[word:chafajushush|chafajushush]] || [[word:chafaj|chafaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chafajuthu|chafajuthu]] || [[word:chafajuju|chafajuju]] || [[word:chafajushu|chafajushu]] || [[word:chafaju|chafaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chafajufuth|chafajufuth]] || [[word:chafajufuj|chafajufuj]] || [[word:chafajufush|chafajufush]] || [[word:chafajuf|chafajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chafajethe|chafajethe]] || [[word:chafajeje|chafajeje]] || [[word:chafajeshe|chafajeshe]] || [[word:chafaje|chafaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chafajothoth|chafajothoth]] || [[word:chafajojoj|chafajojoj]] || [[word:chafajoshosh|chafajoshosh]] || [[word:chafaj|chafaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chafajotho|chafajotho]] || [[word:chafajojo|chafajojo]] || [[word:chafajosho|chafajosho]] || [[word:chafajo|chafajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chafajofoth|chafajofoth]] || [[word:chafajofoj|chafajofoj]] || [[word:chafajofosh|chafajofosh]] || [[word:chafajof|chafajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chafaj忙th忙|chafaj忙th忙]] || [[word:chafaj忙j忙|chafaj忙j忙]] || [[word:chafaj忙sh忙|chafaj忙sh忙]] || [[word:chafaj忙|chafaj忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chafajathath|chafajathath]] || [[word:chafajajaj|chafajajaj]] || [[word:chafajashash|chafajashash]] || [[word:chafaj|chafaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chafajatha|chafajatha]] || [[word:chafajaja|chafajaja]] || [[word:chafajasha|chafajasha]] || [[word:chafaja|chafaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chafajafath|chafajafath]] || [[word:chafajafaj|chafajafaj]] || [[word:chafajafash|chafajafash]] || [[word:chafajaf|chafajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:chafajasha|chafajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochafajasha|gochafajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichafajasha|gokichafajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafajn眉sha|chafajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochafajnkn眉sha|gochafajnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichafajn眉sha|gokichafajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafajsh毛sha|chafajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafajnksh毛sha|gochafajnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafajsh毛sha|gokichafajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chafajrosha|chafajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochafajnkrosha|gochafajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichafajrosha|gokichafajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chafajmusha|chafajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafajnkmusha|gochafajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafajmusha|gokichafajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:chafajsherasha|chafajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochafajnksherasha|gochafajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichafajsherasha|gokichafajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:chafajngasha|chafajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochafajnkngasha|gochafajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichafajngasha|gokichafajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chafajyasha|chafajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochafajnkyasha|gochafajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichafajyasha|gokichafajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:chafajyamasha|chafajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochafajnkyamasha|gochafajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichafajyamasha|gokichafajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:chafajn眉sh毛sha|chafajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochafajnkn眉sh毛sha|gochafajnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichafajn眉sh毛sha|gokichafajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chafajn眉rosha|chafajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochafajnkn眉rosha|gochafajnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichafajn眉rosha|gokichafajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafajn眉musha|chafajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafajnkn眉musha|gochafajnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafajn眉musha|gokichafajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:chafajsh毛n眉sha|chafajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochafajnksh毛n眉sha|gochafajnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichafajsh毛n眉sha|gokichafajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chafajsh毛rosha|chafajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochafajnksh毛rosha|gochafajnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichafajsh毛rosha|gokichafajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafajsh毛musha|chafajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafajnksh毛musha|gochafajnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafajsh毛musha|gokichafajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:chafajron眉sha|chafajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochafajnkron眉sha|gochafajnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichafajron眉sha|gokichafajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:chafajrosh毛sha|chafajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochafajnkrosh毛sha|gochafajnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichafajrosh毛sha|gokichafajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafajromusha|chafajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafajnkromusha|gochafajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafajromusha|gokichafajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:chafajmun眉sha|chafajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochafajnkmun眉sha|gochafajnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichafajmun眉sha|gokichafajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:chafajmush毛sha|chafajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochafajnkmush毛sha|gochafajnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichafajmush毛sha|gokichafajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chafajmurosha|chafajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochafajnkmurosha|gochafajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichafajmurosha|gokichafajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:chafaj|chafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙f忙j|ch忙f忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochafaj|hochafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙f忙j|hoch忙f忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochafaj|hohochafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙f忙j|hohoch忙f忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉chafaj|n眉chafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙f忙j|n眉ch忙f忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉chafaj|n眉n眉chafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙f忙j|n眉n眉ch忙f忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂chafaj|n茂chafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙f忙j|n茂ch忙f忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂chafaj|n茂n茂chafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙f忙j|n茂n茂ch忙f忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchafaj|luchafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙f忙j|luch忙f忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchafaj|luluchafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙f忙j|luluch忙f忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichafaj|lichafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙f忙j|lich忙f忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichafaj|lilichafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙f忙j|lilich忙f忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochafaj|kochafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙f忙j|koch忙f忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochafaj|kokochafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙f忙j|kokoch忙f忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechafaj|kechafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙f忙j|kech忙f忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechafaj|kekechafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙f忙j|kekech忙f忙j]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
